strings.BOG_PATHFINDER_BODY_DESCRIPTION: Pathfinder est callidus et evasor pugnator qui cum falco robotico Squall pugnat.
strings.BOG_PATHFINDER_BODY_MASTERYUNLOCKABLE_AC: Quam Pathfinder, vince ludum aut oblitera super Monsoon.
strings.BOG_PATHFINDER_BODY_OUTRO_FAILURE: ..et sic evanuerunt, in silvas indifferentes perpetuo amissi.
strings.BOG_PATHFINDER_BODY_OUTRO_FLAVOR: ..et sic abierunt, ut novi reges catenae alimentariae.
strings.BOG_PATHFINDER_BODY_PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION: Comitatur te falco roboticus Squall. Squall <style=cIsDamage>maximam partem</style> rerum tuarum heredit et damni immunis est, sed in <style=cIsUtility>bateria</style> nititur.
strings.BOG_PATHFINDER_BODY_SECONDARY_DASH_DESCR: <style=cIsUtility>Labi</style> breve. Proximo tempore cum primum habitum uteris, <style=cIsDamage>hastam pyrobolicam</style> mitte pro <style=cIsDamage>800% damno</style>.
strings.BOG_PATHFINDER_BODY_SPECIAL_ATTACK_DESCR: Attentionem Squall in hostem destinatum dirige et <color=#FF0000>Modum Impetuum</color> activa, accessum ad tormenta machinatorum <style=cIsDamage>2x30% damni</style> inferentium et tormentum missilium <style=cIsDamage>150% damni</style> inferens dans.
strings.BOG_PATHFINDER_BODY_SPECIAL_COMMAND_DESC: Imperium para Squall. Imperium <color=#FF0000>Impetus</color>, <color=#00FF00>Sequi</color>, aut <color=#efeb1c>Speciale</color> edere potes prementem claves primarii, secundarii aut specialis habitus respectively.
strings.BOG_PATHFINDER_BODY_SPECIAL_FOLLOW_DESCR: Squall ad te proximum reduce et <color=#00FF00>Modum Sequendi</color> activa, eum iubens prope te manere.
strings.BOG_PATHFINDER_BODY_UTILITY_BOLAS_DESCRI: Mite bolas electris onere missas quae <style=cIsUtility>fulminant</style> hostes vicinos et <style=cIsUtility>campum electrocutionis</style> per <style=cIsUtility>10 secundos</style> relinquant.
strings.BOG_PATHFINDER_BODY_UTILITY_SPIN_DESCRIP: In aerum ascende, celeriter gyrans pro <style=cIsDamage>300% damno</style>. In terram casu, ictum horizontalem fac pro <style=cIsDamage>800% damno</style>.
strings.BOG_SQUALL_SECONDARY_MISSILE_DESCRIPTION: Impetum 4 missilium mitte pro <style=cIsDamage>150% damno</style> unoquoque.
strings.BOG_SQUALL_SPECIAL_GOFORTHROAT_DESCRIPTI: Iube Squall hostem destinatum saepe impetum facere pro <style=cIsDamage>70% damno</style>. Unusquisque impetus breviter <style=cIsDamage>loricam</style> reducit et <style=cIsUtility>1%</style> batteriae restituit, duplicatus in Ictibus Criticis. Hic habitus breviter <style=cIsUtility>batteriam onerare</style> potest.
strings.SECONDARY_DASH_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsUtility>Labi</style> breve. Proximo tempore cum primum habitum uteris, <style=cIsDamage>hastam pyrobolicam</style> mitte ut <style=cIsDamage>800% damno</style> inficias et <style=cIsUtility>800% batteriae</style> restituas, duplicatus per Ictus Criticos.
strings.SPECIAL_ATTACK_DESCRIPTION: Attentionem Squall in hostem destinatum dirige et <color=#FF0000>Modum Impetuum</color> activa, accessum ad tormenta machinatorum <style=cIsDamage>2x30% damni</style> inferentium et tormentum missilium <style=cIsDamage>150% damni</style> inferens dans.
strings.SPECIAL_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION: Imperium para Squall. Imperium <color=#FF0000>Impetus</color>, <color=#00FF00>Sequi</color>, aut <color=#efeb1c>Speciale</color> edere potes prementem claves primarii, secundarii aut specialis habitus respectively.
strings.SPECIAL_FOLLOW_DESCRIPTION: Squall ad te proximum reduce et <color=#00FF00>Modum Sequendi</color> activa, eum iubens prope te manere.
strings.SQUALL_SPECIAL_GOFORTHROAT_DESCRIPTION: Iube Squall hostem destinatum saepe impetum facere pro <style=cIsDamage>70% damno</style>. Unusquisque impetus breviter <style=cIsDamage>loricam</style> reducit et <style=cIsUtility>1%</style> batteriae restituit, duplicatus in Ictibus Criticis. Hic habitus breviter <style=cIsUtility>batteriam onerare</style> potest.
strings.UTILITY_BOLAS_DESCRIPTION: Mite bolas electris onere missas quae <style=cIsUtility>fulminant</style> hostes vicinos et <style=cIsUtility>campum electrocutionis</style> per <style=cIsUtility>10 secundos</style> relinquant.
strings.UTILITY_SPIN_DESCRIPTION: In aerum ascende, celeriter gyrans pro <style=cIsDamage>300% damno</style>. In terram casu, ictum horizontalem fac pro <style=cIsDamage>800% damno</style>.
